modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to send envelopes on behalf of another user in DocuSign.

full_description_text: 
I am trying to send envelopes in DocuSign, but I cannot do it for another user. I want to share my envelopes with another user in DocuSign, but I do not know how to do this. Also, I need to know if I can get my department's shared envelopes, because sharing is important for my work. It is confusing and I need help with this issue.
short_description: Need to send envelopes on behalf of another user in DocuSign.
description: I am trying to send envelopes in DocuSign, but I cannot do it for another user. I want to share my envelopes with another user in DocuSign, but I do not know how to do this.
